product.name: Oil Rubbed Bronze Battery Operated Wall Sconces with Remote Control, Wireless Wall Sconce Set of 2, Rechargeable Cordless Wall Lights for Living Room Bathroom Hallway Entryway Stairwell
product.description: It is an excellent choice for your bathroom mirror or bedroom, living room, dressing table, vanity table, mirror cabinets, doorway or entryway, corridor, foyer, bar, coffee shop.
features: ⭐【Wireless Sconces】No wiring, no electrician, no hassle! These battery-operated ORB (Oil-Rubbed Bronze) wall sconces can be installed within minutes using the included screws. Perfect for any indoor area—from the living room, hallway, stairway, or bedroom to the bathroom—offering flexible placement and classic style.

⭐【Rechargeable Sconces Wall Decor】This 12000mAh battery-powered wall sconce lasts up to 24 hours at full brightness and up to 96 hours at a low 20% brightness setting. Charging is very convenient using the included USB-C cable. Simply remove the light from the back panel and plug it in, no need to unscrew the bulb or remove the battery.

⭐【Wall Sconce with Touch Switch & Remote Control】 Adjust brightness smoothly (10%-100%) via touch switch or remote—set cozy 3000K warm light for reading, relaxing, or ambiance. Also it has a memory function, when you turn it on again, the brightness level is still the one you set last time.

⭐【E26 Edison Bulbs Included】Our sconce wall decor set of 2 come with 2 energy-efficient LED dimmable Edison bulbs. These 5V bulbs are specially designed for the sconce and cannot be replaced with standard bulbs, ensuring efficient, long-lasting lighting.

⭐【Wide Application for Cordless wall sconces】The battery wall sconce is made of metal, with strong corrosion resistance. Adopting thick transparent glass lampshade, it is not easy to break and has strong light transmission, is perfect for use as accent lighting in bathrooms, hallways, stairways, or as decorative lighting in farmhouse or modern-style homes.

⭐【 2-Year Guarantee】Santostock provides a 2-year guarantee for our products. Your satisfaction is our priority. Suppose you need any replacement parts, no rush to return them. Please get in touch with us through Amazon first and we are sure will give you the best solution. 24/7 customer service for you.
